verification_email_sent: Welcome. Your account has been created and a verification email has been sent.

family_high_risk_title: Caution for children and sensitive individuals
family_high_risk_desc: The overall analysis of this product appears to be high risk. The ingredients should be reviewed carefully before regular use or consumption.

family_goal_salt_desc: This product appears high in salt density.

mission_today_2_text: Review additives in at least 1 product today.

insight_1_text: Ingredients listed first usually make up the largest portion of the product.
insight_2_text: The ingredient profile can vary significantly between products of the same brand. Review each product separately.
insight_3_text: High-risk additives may not affect every user the same way, but regular tracking helps make informed choices.
insight_4_text: A barcode country code does not always mean the true manufacturing origin; check product details as well.

premium_subtitle: Free keeps scan, score, and basic price comparison open. Premium unlocks an ad-free experience, deeper market optimization, and smarter shopping tools.

monthly_plan_meta: Monthly access for users who want a flexible entry point.

nutrition_preferences_subtitle: Get personal fit warnings based on gluten, lactose, palm oil and vegan/vegetarian preferences.
nutrition_preferences_screen_subtitle: Your selected preferences affect the personal fit card on scanned products and the alternative product filters.
nutrition_preferences_reset_message: All dietary preferences will be turned off. Do you want to continue?
scanner_mode_text_body: For food, scan both the ingredients and the nutrition facts table. For cosmetics, scan the INCI list; for medicine, the intended-use section. Incomplete text leads to limited results.
text_mode_capture_hint: For food, scan the ingredients first and the nutrition facts table as well. If only the ingredient text is read, the result can stay limited and be inaccurate.
text_mode_capture_warning: A fuller food interpretation needs both ingredients and nutrition values. Cosmetics and medicines can often be interpreted from the relevant section alone.
manual_text_help: For food, paste both the ingredients and the nutrition facts table. If only ingredient text is provided, the result may stay limited.
text_mode_food_ocr_ingredients_only_mess: Only the ingredient text could be read. Because the nutrition facts table was not captured, this result may stay limited and does not replace an official nutrition score.
text_mode_food_manual_ingredients_only_m: Only ingredient text was entered. Without the nutrition facts table, this result may stay limited and does not replace an official nutrition score.
text_mode_food_ocr_with_nutrition_messag: Ingredients and nutrition values were both read. Because no strong product match was found, this result is still directional.
text_mode_food_manual_with_nutrition_mes: Ingredients and nutrition values were both entered. Because no strong product match was found, this result is still directional.
preference_gluten_free_desc: Show warnings for products with gluten signals and filter alternatives accordingly.
preference_lactose_free_desc: Show warnings for products carrying lactose or milk signals.
preference_palm_oil_free_desc: Warn on products containing palm oil and surface cleaner alternatives first.
preference_vegetarian_desc: Show caution notes for products without a vegetarian compatibility signal.
preference_vegan_desc: Apply warnings and filtering for products without a vegan compatibility signal.
dietary_detail_label_compatible: The product label shows a compatible signal for this preference.
dietary_detail_analysis_compatible: Ingredient analysis gives a compatible signal for this preference.
dietary_detail_generic_compatible: A positive compatibility signal was found for this preference.
dietary_detail_allergen_warning: An allergen signal for {{value}} was found.
dietary_detail_trace_warning: A trace signal for {{value}} was found.
dietary_detail_analysis_warning: Ingredient analysis gives a conflicting signal for this preference.
dietary_detail_generic_warning: A cautionary signal was detected for this preference.
dietary_detail_unknown: There is not enough data for this preference.
smart_notifications_error: Notification preferences could not be updated. Please try again.
notification_reminder_empty_with_product: You have not scanned anything today yet. You can revisit choices like {{name}}.
notification_reminder_empty: You have not scanned anything today yet. Continue with a quick scan.
notification_reminder_light: You can strengthen your safer choices by scanning a few more products today.
notification_reminder_habit: You usually scan around this time. Keep your rhythm with a new barcode.
notification_reminder_active: Keep today’s scan rhythm going. Scan one more product and refresh your list.
notification_summary_best_product: Today’s standout product is {{name}} with a score of {{score}}/100. Revisit the details.

notification_summary_default: Open the history screen to see today’s best scored products.
ecode_screen_subtitle: Review E-codes, additive classes and risk signals on one screen to interpret ingredients more confidently.
privacy_policy_open_error: Privacy policy could not be opened.
about_app_summary: BarkodAnaliz brings together food, cosmetic, and medicine barcode lookup with scores, ingredient signals, and official source links in one place.
about_app_source_line: Data sources include OpenFoodFacts, OpenBeautyFacts, and official TITCK catalogs.
about_app_catalog_line: The built-in E-code catalog makes additives easier to review and compare.
about_app_privacy_line: Scan history stays on-device, while Firebase cache is used for faster results in allowed scenarios.
about_app_support_line: You can reach support from inside the app and follow version updates from this screen.
contact_open_error: Mail app could not be opened.
logout_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to log out of your account?
share_sheet_subtitle: Share the product summary on social platforms or other apps.
share_to_x_desc: Opens the share flow with a ready-to-post tweet.
share_to_facebook_desc: Sends the product link and summary to the share screen.
share_to_instagram_desc: Opens the system share flow with a ready caption.
share_to_more_desc: Share through WhatsApp, Mail, and other apps.
gs1_notice_with_origin: GS1 prefix info: {{gs1}}. The product origin field is shown separately.
gs1_notice_without_origin: Actual origin information was not found. The displayed GS1 field is the barcode registration region: {{gs1}}.
analysis_summary_additive_signal: {{count}} ingredient signals were reviewed and additive-based risk was included.
analysis_summary_api_complete: Analysis completed using API score and product grade.
analysis_summary_clean_default: No clearly risky ingredient was detected.
recommendation_beauty_high_additive: Potentially concerning components were found. Review the ingredient details before using this cosmetic product.
recommendation_beauty_high_basic: The cosmetic product appears to have a high risk level. Review the ingredients and intended use carefully.
recommendation_beauty_medium_additive: The cosmetic formula contains some components that deserve extra attention.
recommendation_beauty_medium_basic: The cosmetic product appears to be at a medium risk level.
recommendation_beauty_low_api: Based on the available data, the cosmetic product appears to be low risk.
recommendation_beauty_low_clean: The cosmetic content looks generally clean.
recommendation_food_high_additive: The product may indicate high risk both in API score and ingredient composition.
recommendation_food_high_basic: Based on the API score, the product appears to be high risk.
recommendation_food_medium_additive: The product requires moderate caution in both ingredient profile and score.
recommendation_food_medium_basic: Based on the API score, the product appears to be medium risk.
recommendation_food_low_api: Based on the API score, the product appears to be low risk.
recommendation_food_low_clean: The content looks clean and generally safe to evaluate.
food_signal_nutrition_detail: An official nutrition score is available and contributed to the overall score.
food_signal_nutrition_detail_with_grade: The official nutrition score and grade signal were both used. Current letter grade: {{grade}}.
food_signal_nutrition_missing: Nutrition score data is missing, so this layer remains limited.
food_highlights_negative_empty: No major negative signal is currently visible.
food_highlights_positive_empty: No strong positive signal is currently visible.
food_highlight_additives_high_detail: {{count}} additive signals were found. It includes ingredients worth avoiding.
food_highlight_additives_detail: {{count}} additive signals were found. The ingredient profile needs a closer read.
food_highlight_calories_red: High energy density per 100 g / mL: {{value}}.
food_highlight_calories_orange: A bit high in energy per 100 g / mL: {{value}}.
food_highlight_salt_orange: A bit too much salt per 100 g / mL: {{value}}.
food_highlight_sugar_orange: A bit too much sugar per 100 g / mL: {{value}}.
food_highlight_low_sugar_light: The sugar impact stays on the low side.
food_highlight_fruit_veg_light: A good fruit / vegetable share is present: {{value}}.
food_signal_processing_nova_1: NOVA 1: Unprocessed or minimally processed product.
food_signal_processing_nova_2: NOVA 2: Culinary ingredient or limited processed product.
food_signal_processing_missing: Processing level data is missing, so the NOVA signal is limited.
food_signal_additives_detail_detected: {{count}} additive signals were found. High-risk component count: {{highCount}}.
food_signal_additives_detail_clean: No clear additive warning signal was found in the ingredient profile.
food_signal_additives_missing: Additive or ingredient data is missing, so this layer remains limited.
food_signal_transparency_full: This score was produced by combining nutrition quality, processing level, and additive signals.
nutrient_balance_subtitle: Available nutrition values are interpreted with color envelopes on a 100 g / 100 mL basis.
food_signal_transparency_partial: This score was produced with the available data. Missing signals: {{missing}}.
food_signal_transparency_limited: Data is limited for this product. The score was produced only from the available signals; missing areas: {{missing}}.
score_methodology_action_subtitle: Open the signals used, data coverage, and scoring logic.
score_methodology_subtitle_food: See which signals shaped the food score and how strong the available data is.
score_methodology_subtitle_beauty: See which signals shaped the cosmetic interpretation and which fields are still missing.
methodology_food_how_body: The food score starts from the official nutrition score or product grade; when those are missing, a local nutrition baseline is derived from the parsed nutrition table fields. Additive signals can lower that baseline, while the NOVA processing level contributes with a smaller secondary weight.
methodology_beauty_how_body: The cosmetic interpretation is built by combining the available source score, ingredient text, and detected ingredient signals.
methodology_signals_available: The following signals were used for this product: {{signals}}.
methodology_signals_missing: Only the basic record is available for this product, so signal data remains limited.
methodology_coverage_full: All three signals are available. The total score is built from the nutrition baseline, additive impact, and a lower-weight processing signal.
methodology_coverage_partial: Some signals are missing: {{missing}}. The overall score was produced only from the available data.
methodology_coverage_limited: Data is limited: {{missing}}. This result should be read as a directional signal.
methodology_beauty_limits_full: The main cosmetic signals are available. Read this interpretation together with the ingredient list and the current source record.
methodology_beauty_limits_missing: Some cosmetic signals are missing: {{missing}}. This interpretation should be read as a precautionary summary.
beauty_methodology_text_full: This cosmetic interpretation is produced by reading the available source score, ingredient text, and usage context together. It is not a medical diagnosis and should be read as a precautionary user summary.
beauty_methodology_text_limited: Data may be limited for this cosmetic interpretation. A precautionary summary is shown using the current record and ingredient signals.
beauty_ingredient_risk_subtitle: Ingredients with risk signals appear first. Tap a row to open the short explanation.
beauty_ingredient_no_clear_signal_detail: No direct match was found for this ingredient in the current local risk library.
scientific_basis_food_summary: The food interpretation is built from official nutrition-score fields when available, otherwise from parsed nutrition table fields, together with additive signals found in the ingredient scan and a lower-weight NOVA processing signal.
scientific_basis_beauty_summary: The cosmetic interpretation is built by reading the product record, ingredient text, and detected ingredient signals together. This surface supports precautionary user awareness rather than medical decision-making.
scientific_basis_medicine_summary: This record was resolved from the official TITCK medicine catalog and, when available, leaflet/SmPC documents. Medicine interpretation relies on the official record chain rather than community commentary.
scientific_link_food_record_helper: Opens the Open Food Facts product record in the in-app browser.
scientific_link_beauty_record_helper: Opens the Open Beauty Facts product record in the in-app browser.
scientific_link_nutri_score_helper: Opens the official public-health page that explains the Nutri-Score A-E and five-color front-of-pack label logic.
scientific_link_who_guidance_helper: Opens the WHO guidance on front-of-pack nutrition labeling.
scientific_link_titck_portal_helper: Opens the official medicine record and document search portal.
methodology_sources_screen_title: How does the scoring system work?
methodology_sources_screen_subtitle: This screen summarizes which data classes BarkodAnaliz scores rely on, which sources they use, and where interpretation limits begin.
methodology_principle_explainable_body: The total score is never left alone; nutrition quality, processing level, additives, or ingredient signals are shown separately.
methodology_principle_transparency_body: If data is missing, the system does not hide it; limited data, missing signals, and interpretation notes are shown clearly.
methodology_principle_independence_body: The scoring logic is not shaped by ads or brand sponsorships; the goal is to guide the user with data-backed signals.
methodology_principle_official_body: For high-trust surfaces such as medicines, official records, leaflets, and regulatory documents take priority over community data.
methodology_principle_scientific_body: Models such as Nutri-Score are not just scores; they should be read together with public-health framing, scientific committee review, and evidence-based algorithm updates.
methodology_food_body: For food products, the total score uses the official nutrition score or product grade as its base; when those are missing, a local nutrition baseline is derived from parsed nutrition table fields. Additive signals may lower the score, while the NOVA processing level contributes with a smaller secondary weight.
methodology_beauty_body: For cosmetics, the product record, ingredient text, and detected ingredient signals are interpreted together to produce a precautionary user summary.
methodology_medicine_body: The medicine screen is for general information; data is resolved from official TITCK records and, when available, leaflet/SmPC documents.
methodology_link_off_subtitle: Food product records, Nutri-Score fields, and ingredient data.
methodology_link_obf_subtitle: Cosmetic product records and ingredient data.
methodology_link_nutri_subtitle: Explains the official Nutri-Score A-E and five-color front-of-pack label logic on the public-health source page.
methodology_link_who_subtitle: WHO guidance on front-of-pack nutrition labeling.
methodology_link_titck_subtitle: Medicine records, leaflets, and SmPC documents.
methodology_limits_body: BarkodAnaliz offers a data-guided interpretation surface. It does not replace medical diagnosis, treatment, or regulatory decisions; for medicines and sensitive health choices, official records and professional advice should remain primary.
home_subtitle_refined: Reach your latest scans, favorites, and live insights from a single screen.
home_subtitle_focus: Allergens, risky additives, and recent scans on one screen.

who_news_fallback_notice: WHO does not provide an official newsroom in this app language, so headlines are shown from the English source.
who_news_refresh_helper: The card refreshes automatically, and you can tap to switch to the next WHO headline.
who_news_tap_helper: Tap the card to open the article, or use the top-right control for the next headline.
today_brief_progress: {{count}} scans were completed today. The best score currently looks like {{score}}.
today_brief_empty: No scans have been made today yet. Start the first analysis with Scan Now.
streak_focus_active: A {{count}} day streak is still going. {{days}} active days were recorded in the last 7 days.
streak_focus_empty: Scan a product today to start a new streak.
district_helper_select_city: Select a city first to see district options.
district_picker_empty: No district matched your search for the selected city.
medicine_notice: This medicine entry was resolved from official TITCK sources. You can open the leaflet and SmPC PDF links below.
medicine_summary_default: This medicine entry was loaded from the official TITCK data source. Review the leaflet and short product information before use.
medicine_recommendation_default: Read the leaflet before using the medicine and follow your doctor’s or pharmacist’s guidance.
medicine_alert_desc: This information was resolved from TITCK medicine records. The leaflet and guidance from healthcare professionals should be considered before use.
medicine_documents_missing: The leaflet or SmPC PDF could not be resolved for this medicine right now.
medicine_document_helper: Opens the patient leaflet in the in-app browser.
medicine_summary_helper: Opens the official short product information PDF from TITCK.
scan_counter_exhausted_subtitle: Unlock 2 extra scans with one rewarded ad.
manual_text_placeholder: Paste ingredients, INCI, nutrition values, or usage text here.
home_onboarding_body: See the allergens that need attention, risky additive codes, and your recent scans at a glance.
history_onboarding_body: Search, filter, favorite, and reopen the products you scanned before.
family_health_profile_hero: Personalize alerts for allergens, additives, and health goals.
help_center_hero_title: Learn the system, scoring, and trust model
help_center_google_subtitle: See the Google session flow, Firebase auth, and common failure states.
help_center_ads_subtitle: Read the banner, interstitial, rewarded, and premium model together.
google_sign_in_info_subtitle: Google session flow, Firebase linkage, and sign-in limits
ads_and_premium_info_subtitle: Banner, interstitial, rewarded ads, and the premium model
help_article_google_subtitle: The Google session flow is completed securely through Firebase authentication.
help_article_google_how_body: The Google sign-in flow links the device's Google authentication to a Firebase account. When it succeeds, the profile and allowed account data are synced into the app.
help_article_google_email_body: For Google sign-in, the account is treated as already verified by the provider. Users who register with email and password are still asked to verify their email separately.
help_article_google_errors_body: Sign-in may fail if Play Services is missing, the Google account flow is cancelled, or the network is unavailable. In that case the app safely stays on the standard login flow.
help_article_ads_subtitle: The free model is ad-supported, while premium unlocks an ad-free and stronger toolset.
help_article_ads_types_body: The app includes banner, interstitial, rewarded, and app-open ad surfaces. Ads are mainly used to support scanning and the free usage model.
help_article_ads_reward: Why is there a rewarded ad?
help_article_ads_reward_body: When the daily free scan quota is exhausted, the user can optionally watch a rewarded ad to gain extra rights. This is not mandatory; premium users continue without ads.
help_article_ads_premium_body: Premium unlocks ad-free usage, broader price and basket tools, richer history, and smarter shopping surfaces. The scoring logic does not change based on premium or ad status.
profile_onboarding_body: Manage your family profile, nutrition preferences, help center, and trust settings from here.
link_open_error: The link could not be opened
clear_logs_error: Test logs could not be cleared
price_compare_category_tree_subtitle: Narrow your search faster by choosing an aisle.
price_compare_category_tree_error: Market aisles could not be loaded right now. You can still continue searching.
price_compare_category_tree_fallback: Live aisle data is delayed, so category filters were built from your search results.
price_onboarding_body: Search by barcode or product name, compare markets side by side, and add products to the basket to see the total gap.
price_compare_selected_pending: Live market offers will appear here.
price_compare_selected_no_live_offers: No live market offers have been found for this product yet.
